description: GitHub Actions tools configuration for project automation and development workflows.

tools.name: Run ESLint Fix
tools.description: Auto-fix all lint and formatting issues in TypeScript/JS/TSX/JSX files across the project using project’s ESLint config.

tools.name: Check Lint (Fast, Cached)
tools.description: Run fast, incremental ESLint with caching for developer feedback.

tools.name: Prettier Format All
tools.description: Format all supported source and markdown files using Prettier, respecting project settings.

tools.name: TypeScript Typecheck (All)
tools.description: Run TypeScript type checking (no emit) across the entire monorepo.

tools.name: Next.js Build (Production)
tools.description: Build the Next.js application for production with strict ESLint settings and optimal Node memory.

tools.name: Next.js Dev (TurboPack)
tools.description: Start the Next.js dev server with TurboPack and optimized memory.

tools.name: Run Playwright Tests
tools.description: Run all Playwright tests for E2E, API, accessibility, and performance coverage.

tools.name: Run Mocha Unit Tests
tools.description: Run Mocha for unit test suites with TypeScript support.

tools.name: Firebase Emulators (Functions)
tools.description: Start Firebase emulators for local testing and development of cloud functions.

tools.name: Firebase Deploy Functions
tools.description: Deploy all Firebase cloud functions to production environment.

tools.name: Audit Dependencies
tools.description: Run an npm audit (prod only), flagging vulnerabilities and missing peer deps.

tools.name: Scan for Unused Vars (Codemod)
tools.description: Remove unused variables using codemod for a clean codebase.

tools.name: Normalize Any Types (Codemod)
tools.description: Scan and codemod simple `any` types to more specific types project-wide.

tools.name: Cycle Detection (Madge)
tools.description: Detect and visualize dependency cycles using Madge.

tools.name: Aggregate and Validate Snapshots
tools.description: Purge, update, and validate all lint/test snapshots and metrics artifacts.
tools.command: npm run snapshot:purge && npm run lint:snapshot && npm run lint:metrics:update

tools.name: Optimize Project
tools.description: Run all project-level optimization scripts (memory, vendor, sharding, etc).

tools.name: DevReady/Production Audit
tools.description: Run project dev-readiness audit or full production checklist script.
